author: pde
text: Non-interactive would sometimes display log output via ncurses

author: pde
text: If the 0.3.0 client was running in sufficiently verbose mode with `--non-interactive` / `-n`, it would sometimes use the ncurses display for logs, and an additional `-t` was required to make all output text. This was fixed by [#2338](https://github.com/certbot/certbot/pull/2338).

author: pde
text: (Already fixed, just opening this ticket for the changelog)
